title: [release-1.18] Bump Go Jose v4.1.4, CVE-2026-34986
body:
Bump github.com/go-jose/go-jose/v4 to v4.1.4 to address CVE-2026-34986

Fixes: https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-164990,
https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-164970, https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/OCPBUGS-81811

comments.body: Packit jobs failed, and I don't see failure logs for the copr build jobs. Let's do another run.

@mtrmac yes on the Go bump to v1.24.  I wasn't thrilled by it, but it's been an issue where ever we have been bumping Go packages lateley.

@lsm5 what's your thoughts on merging this now with the test failures?
